'''tangocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumohemopericardium|pneumohemopericardium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ng-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumohemopericardium|pneumohemopericardium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tangocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tængecheth|tængecheth]] || [[word:tængechej|tængechej]] || [[word:tængechesh|tængechesh]] || [[word:tængeche|tængeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tangongochoth|tangongochoth]] || [[word:tangongochoj|tangongochoj]] || [[word:tangongochosh|tangongochosh]] || [[word:tangongocho|tangongocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tangochoth|tangochoth]] || [[word:tangochoj|tangochoj]] || [[word:tangochosh|tangochosh]] || [[word:tangocho|tangocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tangofchoth|tangofchoth]] || [[word:tangofchoj|tangofchoj]] || [[word:tangofchosh|tangofchosh]] || [[word:tangofchof|tangofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tangochotho|tangochotho]] || [[word:tangochojo|tangochojo]] || [[word:tangochosho|tangochosho]] || [[word:tangochoko|tangochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tangochoth|tangochoth]] || [[word:tangochoj|tangochoj]] || [[word:tangochosh|tangochosh]] || [[word:tangocho|tangocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tangochothol|tangochothol]] || [[word:tangochojol|tangochojol]] || [[word:tangochoshol|tangochoshol]] || [[word:tangochokol|tangochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tangochothotho|tangochothotho]] || [[word:tangochojojo|tangochojojo]] || [[word:tangochoshosho|tangochoshosho]] || [[word:tangochoko|tangochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tangochothon|tangochothon]] || [[word:tangochojon|tangochojon]] || [[word:tangochoshon|tangochoshon]] || [[word:tangochokon|tangochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tangochothoro|tangochothoro]] || [[word:tangochojoro|tangochojoro]] || [[word:tangochoshoro|tangochoshoro]] || [[word:tangochokoro|tangochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
